story.title: Flight Risk
story.logline: When two inexperienced passengers hijack a commercial flight, the pilot must navigate their antics while keeping the plane airborne.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet SAM and LEO, two bumbling friends trying to escape their mundane lives. We also meet ALI, the no-nonsense pilot, and ABEESA, the charming flight hostess.

acts.label: Rising Action
acts.description: As Sam and Leo try to cause trouble on the plane, Ali must use his wits to keep the passengers safe while Abeesa tries to maintain a sense of normalcy.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: The plane hits turbulence and Sam and Leo's antics spiral out of control, forcing Ali to make a split-second decision to save the day.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: The plane lands safely, but not before Sam and Leo's antics bring the passengers together in a moment of unexpected camaraderie.

story.world: The world of commercial aviation is a delicate balance of safety, efficiency, and human emotion.
